userMessage: Build a practical oscilloscope validation flow for the current model using only valid TekAutomate step types, and explain why you chose that sequence.

errors: Prose exceeded 400 characters and was truncated.

response.text:
I chose this sequence because it validates the most practical things we can prove with the verified SCPI available this turn: session connectivity, writing known acquisition settings, reading those settings back independently, checking for instrument errors, and then closing the session cleanly.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"MSO4_5_6 Acquisition Configuration Validation","description":"Practical MSO4/5/6 validation flow using verified SCPI only: set deterministic acquisition stop mode and record length, query both back, check for errors, and disconnect cleanly.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"s1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":[],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"g_auto_1","type":"group","label":"Operation","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"s2","type":"comment","label":"Comment","params":{"text":"This flow validates basic scope control by applying verified acquisition settings and reading them back."}}]},{"id":"g_auto_2","type":"group","label":"Trigger / Acquisition","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"s3","type":"write","label":"Set Stop After Sequence","params":{"command":"ACQuire:STOPAfter SEQuence"}},{"id":"s4","type":"write","label":"Set Record Length","params":{"command":"HORizontal:RECOrdlength 1000"}},{"id":"s5","type":"query","label":"Read Stop After","params":{"command":"ACQuire:STOPAfter?","saveAs":"stop_after_mode"}},{"id":"s6","type":"query","label":"Read Record Length","params":{"command":"HORizontal:RECOrdlength?","saveAs":"record_length_points"}}]},{"id":"g_auto_3","type":"group","label":"Validation / Error Check","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"s7","type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"}}]},{"id":"s8","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":[]}}]}}]}
